name: Zotero Sync
description: SDK-side reconciler for Zotero → Thymer sync. Drains desired-state blobs from the 'Zotero Inbox' collection into 'References' (scalars + multi-value relations + annotations) — the multi-value writes MCP can't do. Global plugin; self-provisions its collections. Also provides the 'Zotero: Library' pull-based search/import panel (set custom.libraryToken from Zotero's extensions.zothymer.libraryToken pref).
